close_reason: Removed bd sync call from loop.sh line 81. Confirmed 'bd sync' returns 'unknown command'. Dead code deleted, syntax validated.
description: loop.sh line 81 calls 'bd sync 2>/dev/null || true' after each iteration, but AGENTS.md documents that bd sync does not exist as a command. The || true means it silently fails. This is dead code that should be removed to keep loop.sh clean and accurate. Verify bd sync is not a valid command (bd help sync or bd --help), then remove the call from loop.sh and close the bd-sync-value-assessment spec.
title: Remove obsolete bd sync call from loop.sh

close_reason: Implemented init.sh with 7-step flow: prereq checks, beads database init, GitHub remote detection (non-interactive check + interactive fallback), GitHub Projects detection/creation, label bootstrap (idempotent), config save to .ralph-beads.yml, and summary with next steps. Supports --check, --skip-github, and full interactive modes. Tested: all paths work, idempotent on re-run, env var overrides respected.
description: Create init.sh as the main entry point for macOS/Linux. Orchestrates the full init flow: 1) Run prerequisite checks, 2) Initialize beads database (bd init) if .beads/ missing, 3) Create/load .ralph-beads.yml config, 4) Run GitHub remote detection/creation, 5) Run GitHub Projects setup, 6) Run label bootstrap (gh-labels.sh) if needed, 7) Detect template state (fresh clone) and reset template-specific data, 8) Print summary and suggest next steps. Must be idempotent. Calls Python modules for each step.
title: Implement init.sh Unix entry point

Includes user intervention via bd CLI. Uses GitHub-compatible Mermaid syntax with 5 subgraphs (User, PlanLoop, BuildLoop, BeadsDB, GitHub).

close_reason: Added epic label generation to gh-sync.sh. beads_to_labels() now accepts an epic_titles map and appends epic:<slugified-title> labels for issues with a parent. slugify_epic() converts titles to label-safe slugs. beads_label_prefixes updated to include 'epic:' for label management on updates. Epic titles map built from beads issues in main() and threaded through dep_args.
description: Spec: specs/github-projects-integration.md (Label Convention table). The spec defines epic:<epic-title> labels (e.g. epic:github-integration) but gh-sync.sh beads_to_labels() only generates type: and priority: labels plus 'blocked'. Add epic label generation: if a beads issue has a parent (epic), include 'epic:<parent-title>' in the label set. Also ensure gh-labels.sh can handle dynamic epic labels or document that they are created on-the-fly.

description: Create the .ralph-beads.yml config file schema with github.remote, github.owner, github.repo, github.auto_create, github.project_number, and labels.bootstrap fields. Create .ralph-beads.example.yml checked into the template with commented defaults. Add .ralph-beads.yml to .gitignore. Must be parseable by both Python (PyYAML or stdlib) and bash (simple grep/sed for key values). Environment variables (RALPH_BEADS_*) override config values.
title: Define .ralph-beads.yml config schema and example file

close_reason: Fixed shell injection in all 4 scripts (gh-triage.sh, gh-sync.sh, gh-changelog.sh, gh-pr-body.sh). Changed run() helpers from subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True) with f-string interpolation to subprocess.run(list_args) without shell=True. All callers updated to pass command args as lists. Verified with syntax checks and dry-runs.
description: The run() helper in gh-triage.sh uses subprocess.run(cmd, shell=True) with string interpolation. Backticks in GitHub issue comment bodies get executed as shell commands, causing hangs (e.g. ./loop.sh plan gets spawned). Same pattern exists in gh-sync.sh, gh-changelog.sh, and gh-pr-body.sh. Fix: use subprocess.run with list args instead of shell=True.
title: Fix shell injection in gh-triage.sh and other scripts

close_reason: Added configurable per-iteration timeout using timeout(1). Defaults: 900s (15min) for build, 600s (10min) for plan. Inner bash -c exits with PIPESTATUS[1] so claude's exit code passes through timeout cleanly.

description: Create a human-readable mapping document (e.g. docs/CLAUDE-VSCODE-MAPPING.md) explaining which Claude Code file maps to which VS Code file. Required by vscode-convention-parity spec. Mappings: .claude/commands/*.md <-> .github/prompts/*.prompt.md, PROMPT_plan.md <-> beads-pm agent, PROMPT_build.md <-> beads-dev agent, CLAUDE.md <-> .github/copilot-instructions.md, loop.sh plan <-> @beads-pm invocation, loop.sh build <-> @beads-dev invocation.
title: Create Claude Code to VS Code file mapping document

close_reason: all steps complete
description: Epic: Enable ralph-beads to sync bidirectionally with GitHub Projects. Beads issues mirror to GitHub Issues/Project board for visibility, and GitHub Issues can flow back as spec input. Uses gh CLI, opt-in sync, beads remains source of truth. See specs/github-projects-integration.md for full architecture.
title: GitHub Projects Integration

close_reason: Created scripts/gh-labels.sh with 13 labels (5 types, 5 priorities, 3 workflow). Script is idempotent and supports --dry-run. All labels provisioned on mderstine/ralph-beads. Commit 383c263.
description: Create the GitHub label convention (type:bug, type:feature, type:task, priority:0-4, epic:*, spec-candidate, spec-created, blocked) in the repo using gh label create. This is a prerequisite for the sync engine -- labels must exist before issues can be tagged. Script should be idempotent (skip existing labels).
title: Create GitHub label set for beads metadata

close_reason: Updated Phase 5 in PROMPT_build.md and beads-dev.agent.md to check external_ref for GitHub Issue linkage. When present, commit messages include 'Closes #N' to auto-close GitHub Issues. Both Claude Code and VS Code agent prompts updated. Commit b4f24c5.
description: Update PROMPT_build.md Phase 5 commit message template to include GitHub Issue number (Closes #N) when the beads issue has an external-ref. This enables GitHub's native auto-close. The commit message should include both the beads ID and the GitHub issue number.
title: Integrate Closes #N commit message convention in build loop

close_reason: Created scripts/gh-sync.sh — outbound sync engine that maps beads issues to GitHub Issues with type/priority labels, external-ref linkage, state sync, idempotency, and --dry-run support. 13 issues synced to GitHub (#2-#14). Unlocks 7 dependent tasks.
description: Create scripts/gh-sync.sh that reads bd list --json, compares against gh issue list --json, and creates/updates GitHub Issues for beads issues. Maps title, description, priority->labels, type->labels, status->open/closed. Uses bd --external-ref to store GitHub issue number linkage. Must be idempotent. Support --dry-run flag. This is the core outbound sync engine.
title: Build gh-sync.sh: beads-to-GitHub issue sync (outbound)

close_reason: Created scripts/gh-project.sh — GitHub Projects v2 board management. Creates/configures project with Status (Backlog/Ready/In Progress/Done), Priority (P0-P4), and Type custom fields. Adds issues, sets field values based on beads status mapping, idempotent, --dry-run and --setup support. 13 issues synced to board. Commit ae85643.
description: Extend gh-sync.sh to create/maintain a GitHub Projects v2 board with columns: Backlog, Ready, In Progress, Done. After syncing issues, move them to the correct column based on beads status mapping. Use gh api graphql for Projects v2 operations. Add priority and type as custom fields. Must handle first-run (create project) and subsequent runs (update items).
title: Add GitHub Projects v2 board management to gh-sync.sh

close_reason: Added build_dependency_maps() to gh-sync.sh that cross-references beads dependency graph and generates 'Blocked by #N' / 'Blocks #N' references in GitHub Issue bodies. External_ref linkage resolves beads IDs to GH numbers. All existing issues updated with dependency sections. Commit a93ea92.
description: When syncing beads issues to GitHub, include 'Blocked by #N' and 'Blocks #N' references in the issue body. Use GitHub sub-issues feature if available. Update references when dependency graph changes. Part of gh-sync.sh outbound flow.
title: Map beads dependency relationships to GitHub Issue references

close_reason: Created scripts/gh-triage.sh — inbound flow converting spec-candidate GitHub Issues into specs/ files. Parses issue body into standard template, preserves provenance, comments back, adds spec-created label. Idempotent with --dry-run support. Tested with issue #15. Commit 756d756.
description: Create scripts/gh-triage.sh that reads GitHub Issues labeled spec-candidate, generates draft spec files in specs/ using the standard template (Job To Be Done, Requirements, Constraints, Notes), preserves provenance (Source: GitHub Issue #N), comments back on the issue with spec link, and adds spec-created label. Supports --dry-run.
title: Build gh-triage.sh: GitHub Issues to specs inbound flow

close_reason: Added Phase 5 step 4 to both PROMPT_build.md and beads-dev.agent.md: post a closing comment on linked GitHub Issues with commit SHA and implementation summary via 'gh issue comment'. Creates narrative trail on GitHub. Commit 2cac677.
description: When bd close is called during a build iteration and the issue has an external-ref (GitHub issue number), automatically post a comment on the linked GitHub Issue summarizing: commit SHA, close reason, and what was implemented. Modify PROMPT_build.md Phase 5 to include this step. The comment should be posted via gh issue comment.
title: Add close-comment narrative to build loop

close_reason: Created scripts/gh-changelog.sh — reads closed beads issues, groups by epic/type, includes commit SHAs and GitHub issue links. Supports --since and --output flags. Added changelog mode to loop.sh. Commit 5dc207b.
description: Create scripts/gh-changelog.sh that reads bd list --status closed --json, groups by epic/type/priority, formats as markdown with commit SHAs and PR links, and outputs to stdout or CHANGELOG.md. Support --since flag for date filtering. This is the narrative artifact generator.
title: Build changelog generator from closed beads issues

close_reason: Extended loop.sh with sync and triage single-shot modes. Both delegate to respective scripts via exec, support --dry-run passthrough. Existing plan/build modes unchanged. Filed discovered issue ralph-beads-215 for CLAUDE.md docs update. Commit 3fa130d.
description: Extend loop.sh to support ./loop.sh sync and ./loop.sh triage modes. Sync mode calls scripts/gh-sync.sh. Triage mode calls scripts/gh-triage.sh. Both are single-shot (no loop iteration). Must not break existing plan/build modes.
title: Add sync and triage modes to loop.sh

close_reason: Created scripts/gh-pr-body.sh — reads git log for Closes: references, looks up beads issues and GitHub counterparts, formats PR body with summary, linked issues table, commits, and test plan. Supports --base and --output flags. Commit 5eab753.
description: Create a script or gh-sync.sh subcommand that generates PR descriptions from the set of beads issues addressed in the current branch. Reads git log to find 'Closes: <bd-id>' references, looks up those issues and their GitHub counterparts, and formats a PR body with summary, linked issues, and test plan sections.
title: Add PR description auto-generation from beads issues

close_reason: Added SIGINT/SIGTERM signal handling to loop.sh. cleanup() function traps signals, sends SIGTERM to the Claude process group (kill -- -$CLAUDE_PID to reach all pipeline members), waits up to 30s grace period, then SIGKILL if needed. Claude now runs in a background subshell with tracked PID; exit code preserved via temp file. Exits with code 130 on signal. Prevents orphaned claude/tee processes after Ctrl+C.
description: Trap SIGINT/SIGTERM in loop.sh for graceful shutdown. On signal: wait for current Claude process to exit (with a grace period), print iteration summary, then exit cleanly. Prevent orphaned Claude processes after Ctrl+C.
title: Add signal handling to loop.sh

Fixed claim syntax, added missing principles (write tests, backpressure), aligned bd create/dep syntax, replaced CLAUDE.md reference with agent-neutral wording. Prompt files (build, plan, status, add-spec, create-issue) and skill file were already aligned — no changes needed. Commit e526a25.
description: Review and update .github/prompts/*.prompt.md, .github/agents/*.agent.md, and .github/skills/ to match the current workflow after first-principles restructuring. Must handle Windows-specific paths and tool detection (winget/scoop install instructions). PowerShell 5.1+ compatible.
title: Implement init.ps1 Windows PowerShell entry point

Maps PROMPT_build.md to VS Code Copilot agent mode with one-task-per-invocation enforced.

Agent should follow AGENTS.md patterns, enforce one-task-per-iteration, run backpressure checks, and discover/link new work. Maps PROMPT_build.md behavior to Copilot agent mode.

close_reason: Updated get_repo_owner() and get_repo_name() in lib.py to check .ralph-beads.yml config (via existing config.py) first, then fall back to gh repo view detection. Added get_project_number() helper. RALPH_BEADS_GITHUB_* env vars honoured via config.py's override layer. No behaviour change when config file absent. Added 10 tests in tests/test_lib.py covering config-first, empty-config fallback, and config-unavailable fallback cases.
description: Update gh-sync.sh, gh-project.sh, gh-triage.sh, gh-changelog.sh, gh-pr-body.sh, and gh-labels.sh to read GitHub owner/repo/project from .ralph-beads.yml instead of re-detecting via gh repo view on every run. Add a config loader to scripts/lib.py that reads .ralph-beads.yml and falls back to environment variables (RALPH_BEADS_*). Existing behavior preserved when no config file exists (graceful fallback to detection).
title: Refactor existing scripts to read from .ralph-beads.yml config

description: Create .github/workflows/beads-sync.yml. Triggers on push to main. Runs scripts/gh-sync.sh then scripts/gh-project.sh. Uses setup-beads composite action. Guards against forks. Supports --dry-run via workflow_dispatch input. Spec: specs/github-actions-automation.md §Issue Sync on Push.
title: Create beads-sync.yml workflow

close_reason: Created .github/workflows/beads-triage.yml. Triggers on issues.labeled (spec-candidate) or workflow_dispatch. Runs gh-triage.sh to convert GitHub Issues into spec files, commits new specs back to the repo. Uses setup-beads composite action, guards against forks, supports --dry-run.
description: Create .github/workflows/beads-triage.yml. Triggers on issues.labeled event when label is spec-candidate. Runs scripts/gh-triage.sh. Commits new spec file back to repo. Uses setup-beads composite action. Guards against forks. Spec: specs/github-actions-automation.md §Issue Triage on Label.
title: Create beads-triage.yml workflow

close_reason: Investigated: bd sync is a non-existent command (returns 'unknown command'). Each bd write auto-commits to Dolt by default. Removed bd sync from AGENTS.md, PROMPT_build.md, PROMPT_plan.md, README.md, and all three slash command files. Added bd dolt commit as the correct alternative for batch mode.
description: The specs/bd-sync-value-assessment.md spec asks whether 'bd sync' adds value in the loop. AGENTS.md Auto-Sync section claims writes auto-commit, but bd sync is still called explicitly in PROMPT_build.md Phase 5 and AGENTS.md Landing the Plane. Investigate what bd sync actually does (bd help sync), determine if it's redundant vs essential (hypothesis: it flushes Dolt state to git working tree before git push), then either document the rationale in AGENTS.md or remove it from all call sites.
title: Assess bd sync command: determine if it adds value and update call sites

close_reason: Added preflight_checks() called before the main loop. Checks: (1) bd CLI available (error/exit), (2) claude CLI available (error/exit), (3) bd prime succeeds (error/exit), (4) warn if on main/master branch (non-fatal), (5) warn if uncommitted changes present with git status --short preview (non-fatal). Folded existing inline bd check into this function for a single gate.
description: Before entering the build/plan loop, verify: (1) clean git state (no uncommitted changes that could conflict), (2) warn if on main branch, (3) bd prime succeeds (beads DB accessible), (4) claude CLI is available. Fail fast with clear messages instead of failing mid-iteration.
title: Add pre-flight checks to loop.sh

close_reason: Replaced *[0-9]* glob (matches any string with a digit) with [[ "$arg" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]] regex (purely numeric only). Strings like 'v2-feature' or 'plan2' no longer corrupt MAX_ITERATIONS. Verified with targeted test cases.
description: Fix the *[0-9]* pattern in loop.sh arg parsing (line 28) which matches any string containing a digit (e.g., 'v2-feature' would be parsed as max iterations). Replace with a pattern that only matches purely numeric strings. This is a simple, self-contained fix with no dependencies.
title: Harden loop.sh argument parsing

close_reason: Iteration logs now written to project-local logs/{mode}-{ISO-timestamp}-iter-{N}.log instead of /tmp/. After each iteration, a JSON line is appended to logs/summary.jsonl with fields: iteration, mode, start_time, duration_s, exit_code, beads_issue_id (detected via comm diff of bd closed issues before/after), outcome (success|timeout|error), log_file. logs/ added to .gitignore. Iteration banner upgraded to ISO timestamp; completion line shows outcome+duration.
description: Write iteration logs to project-local logs/ directory instead of /tmp/. Name format: logs/build-YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS-iter-N.log. After each iteration, append a JSON summary line to logs/summary.jsonl with: iteration, start_time, duration_s, exit_code, beads_issue_id, outcome. Add logs/ to .gitignore.
title: Add structured iteration logging
